title: Parity: link (Rust/Zephyr/Python)
description: Policy: three-impl parity. Module: link. Rust: complete (2501 LoC). Zephyr: complete (3059 LoC). Python: partial (904 LoC). Gap: Python missing schnorr signatures, identity management, full link-layer security. Need to port Rust/Zephyr link features to Python.
close_reason: Verified compliant: Python link layer has full feature parity with Rust/Zephyr. Core features present in all three: Schnorr48 signatures (schnorr48.py 156 LoC), identity management (identity.py 124 LoC), frame format (frame.py 201 LoC), replay protection (replay.py 157 LoC), link layer with TOFU/key-pinning (link_layer.py 555 LoC). 50 Python tests pass. Python total ~1193 LoC vs Rust 2512 LoC reflects Python's compact syntax, not missing features. Bead description was outdated.
